name: Aoraki Mackenzie Dark Sky Reserve
description: The world's largest International Dark Sky Reserve, located in New Zealand's South Island. The reserve encompasses the Aoraki/Mount Cook National Park and the Mackenzie Basin. Home to the Mount John University Observatory, the reserve achieved Gold Tier status — the highest IDA rating. The Southern Hemisphere skies offer views of the Magellanic Clouds, Southern Cross, and the galactic center at its highest altitude.
